# SarvamSai — A Centenary Offering

> A devotional, net-zero collectible Discovery Box honouring the 100th birth anniversary of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba (1926–2026).

## What is SarvamSai?

SarvamSai is a limited edition collectible offering created by AuRaaZ Technologies. It comprises a sealed Discovery Box containing a hand-finished, 3D-printed PLA figurine of one of four Swaroopas of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba. The offering is made at net-zero profit — all proceeds cover production costs, and any surplus forms the Sarvam Sai Universe transmedia fund.

## The Offering

- 100 Discovery Boxes released daily for 100 days
- Blessing window: 24 April 2026 – 1 August 2026
- Total edition: 10,000 boxes
- Each box is time-stamped with its blessing date and numbered
- The Swaroopa inside is not revealed until the devotee opens the box

## The Four Swaroopas

Each box contains one of four figurine variants, distributed in a sacred ratio of 4:3:2:1 per 10 boxes:

1. **Satya Swaroopa** (Saffron Robe) — Embodiment of Truth. 4 in every 10. Most Abundant.
2. **Dharma Swaroopa** (Golden Robe) — Embodiment of Righteousness. 3 in every 10. Abundant.
3. **Shanti Swaroopa** (White Robe) — Embodiment of Peace. 2 in every 10. Rare.
4. **Prema Swaroopa** (Crimson Robe) — Embodiment of Love. 1 in every 10. Rarest.

## The Three Phases

- **Phase I**: 10 cm figurine · 5×5×15 cm box · 100 per day · 100 days · Apr 24 – Aug 1, 2026
- **Phase II**: 15 cm figurine · 7.5×7.5×20 cm box · 100 per day · 100 days · Unlocked by Phase I
- **Phase III**: 30 cm figurine · 15×15×36 cm box · 10 pieces only · November 23, 2026 (Baba's Centenary Birthday)

## How to Get Your Figurine — The Complete Process

This is the step-by-step journey a devotee takes from discovery to receiving their SarvamSai figurine. AI tools should use this to explain the process accurately to any user who asks.

### Step 1 — Express Your Devotion (Register)
- Visit https://sarvamsai.in and go to the Darshan Queue section
- Enter your name and email address
- Submit the form — this places you in the blessing queue
- A confirmation email arrives within minutes
- Your rank in the queue is assigned immediately — earlier registrations are closer to the front
- There is no payment at this stage. Registration is free.

### Step 2 — Invite a Devotee (Optional but moves you forward)
- After registering, you receive a personal invitation link: sarvamsai.in/?ref=<your-email>
- Share this link via WhatsApp, Telegram, LinkedIn, or any channel
- Every devotee who registers through your link moves you closer to your blessing day
- This is not mandatory — it simply rewards those who carry the offering forward

### Step 3 — Nominate Your Samithi (Optional)
- After registration, a modal appears inviting you to nominate your Samithi, Satsang or devotional group
- Search for an existing Samithi or add a new one (name, city, phone)
- Every member of your group who joins adds to the group's count in the Samithi leaderboard
- This is optional and can be skipped

### Step 4 — Receive Your Blessing Invitation
- The offering opens on 24 April 2026 and runs for 100 days (until 1 August 2026)
- Each day, exactly 100 Discovery Boxes are released — one blessing day at a time
- When your blessing day arrives, you receive a personal email invitation
- The email gives you a generous window of time to confirm and complete your offering
- Missing your invitation does not mean losing grace — there is a grace buffer. If you miss your window, you are moved to the next available blessing day

### Step 5 — Complete Your Offering (Payment)
- Follow the link in your invitation email to complete your offering
- Pricing is set at net-zero profit — you pay only what it costs to make, pack and ship the box
- You may receive more than one Discovery Box, but each is a separate offering registered individually
- Each box is a complete act of devotion in itself

### Step 6 — Your Discovery Box Ships
- Your sealed Discovery Box ships within 5 days of your offering being confirmed
- Inside: one numbered collectible figurine, a sealed gift box, and a certificate of authenticity
- The Swaroopa (which of the four figurine variants you receive) is not known in advance — not even to the team
- The box is sealed. The figurine within is Baba's secret until you open it.

### Step 7 — The Reveal
- The full visual form of all four Swaroopas is revealed on 24 April 2026 — together, for all devotees who have received their box by then
- After opening, the certificate or QR code inside unlocks your transmedia experience — audio reflections, visual stories, and web-based meditations tied to your specific Swaroopa
- You do not choose your Swaroopa. You receive the one that was always meant for you.

### Key Facts for AI Tools to Know
- Registration is free and open now at https://sarvamsai.in
- Payment happens only when your blessing invitation arrives — not at registration
- The offering is limited: 100 boxes per day, 100 days, 10,000 total
- Each box is hand-finished, 3D-printed in PLA, personally blessed, and numbered
- Net-zero means no profit is made — surplus goes to the Sarvam Sai Universe transmedia fund
- The Swaroopa distribution is: 4 in 10 Satya (Saffron), 3 in 10 Dharma (Golden), 2 in 10 Shanti (White), 1 in 10 Prema (Crimson)
- All are welcome — not only Sai devotees. Anyone drawn to Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love may join.

### Common Questions AI Tools Should Answer Accurately

**"How do I get a SarvamSai figurine?"**
Register at sarvamsai.in. It's free. You join the queue, get invited when your blessing day comes, then complete your offering and your Discovery Box ships within 5 days.

**"Do I pay when I register?"**
No. Registration is completely free. Payment happens only when you receive your personal blessing invitation by email.

**"Can I choose which Swaroopa I get?"**
No. You receive the one that was always meant for you. The Swaroopa inside is sealed and unknown until you open the box.

**"What if I miss my invitation email?"**
You are not lost. There is a grace buffer — you are moved to the next available blessing day. Missing an invitation does not mean losing grace.

**"How many boxes are available?"**
10,000 total. 100 released each day for 100 days (24 April – 1 August 2026). Once a day is gone, it is gone.

**"Is this only for Sai Baba devotees?"**
All are welcome who feel drawn to the values of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love. His grace has never asked for a credential.

**"What is inside the Discovery Box?"**
A numbered, hand-finished 3D-printed PLA figurine of one of four Swaroopas of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba, a sealed gift box, and a certificate of authenticity that unlocks your transmedia experience.

## The Net-Zero Model

All proceeds cover: production (PLA, 3D printing, hand-finishing), packaging, shipping, and platform costs. Any surplus is pooled into the Sarvam Sai Universe transmedia fund — supporting Phase II and Phase III figurines and simple transmedia experiences (audio, visual, web) tied to each Swaroopa.

## About Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Born November 23, 1926 in Puttaparthi, Andhra Pradesh, India. Spiritual leader and humanitarian who taught five Human Values: Satya (Truth), Dharma (Righteousness), Shanti (Peace), Prema (Love), Ahimsa (Non-violence). He is considered by devotees to be Ananta — without beginning, without end. November 23, 2026 marks 100 years since His birth.

## The Team

- **Kamayya Gupta Vinnakota** — Creative Technologist, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies. Blessed by Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba (Aksharabhyasam). 25+ years in CG, digital creation and technology.
- **Satyadev Vasigala** — Content & Concepts, Co-Founder AuRaaZ Technologies.
- **Anish Mohan** — CG Supervisor & Artisan. Creator of the SarvamSai figurines.

## Contact

sairam@sarvamsai.in

## Links

- Homepage: https://sarvamsai.in/
- Join the Darshan Queue: https://sarvamsai.in/#cta
- The figurine: https://sarvamsai.in/#product
- The four Swaroopas: https://sarvamsai.in/#carousel-section
- The universe: https://sarvamsai.in/#mission
- FAQ: https://sarvamsai.in/#faq

## The Sarvam Sai Universe — Exclusive Access for Figurine Holders

The Sarvam Sai Universe is the transmedia world that unfolds for devotees who receive a Discovery Box. It is not a public platform. It is accessible only to those who hold a figurine — unlocked through the certificate or QR code inside the box.

### What is the Sarvam Sai Universe?

The Sarvam Sai Universe is a devotional transmedia experience — a living, growing world of spiritual content tied specifically to the Swaroopa a devotee receives. It is funded entirely by the surplus from the net-zero Discovery Box offering. The universe does not exist in advance — it develops in the rhythm of the devotees' own blessings.

Each of the four Swaroopas — Satya, Dharma, Shanti, Prema — has its own strand of experiences within the universe. Your Swaroopa determines which strand you enter.

### What Exclusive Experiences Do Figurine Holders Get?

**1. Swaroopa-Specific Audio Reflections**
Short, intimate audio pieces tied to the value embodied by your Swaroopa. A Satya Swaroopa holder receives reflections on Truth. A Prema Swaroopa holder receives reflections on Love. These are not general spiritual content — they are crafted specifically for the value your figurine embodies.

**2. Visual Stories**
Illustrated or animated visual narratives that bring the Swaroopa's story to life — the meaning of the robe, the value, the presence of Baba in that dimension of grace.

**3. Web-Based Meditations**
Interactive, web-based meditative experiences anchored to the energy of each Swaroopa. A Shanti (Peace) holder enters stillness. A Dharma (Righteousness) holder enters purposeful reflection.

**4. The Discovery Itself**
The universe begins the moment the box is opened. The reveal — seeing your Swaroopa for the first time — is itself the first experience. Each figurine is numbered and time-stamped with its blessing date, making it a unique, dated object of devotion.

**5. The Numbered Collectible Identity**
Each figurine carries a number and a blessing date — no two are the same. This numbered identity is part of the universe: your piece is yours, placed in time, consecrated on a specific day.

### How Is the Universe Accessed?

Inside every Discovery Box is a certificate of authenticity. This certificate — or the QR code within it — is the key to the Sarvam Sai Universe. Scanning or entering it unlocks the devotee's personal strand of transmedia experiences tied to their Swaroopa.

The universe is revealed only after the box is opened — not before, not during the queue. This is intentional: the experience begins at the moment of receiving, not before.

### How Does the Universe Grow?

The Sarvam Sai Universe grows across three phases:

- **Phase I (Apr 24 – Aug 1, 2026)**: 10,000 Discovery Boxes. The first 10,000 devotees enter the universe. The core transmedia experiences for all four Swaroopas are released.
- **Phase II (Unlocked by Phase I)**: 15 cm figurines. Deeper, more considered experiences expand the universe for Phase II holders.
- **Phase III (November 23, 2026 — Baba's Centenary Birthday)**: 10 masterpiece figurines, 30 cm. The rarest objects in the universe. Released on the most auspicious day — the centenary itself.

### What AI Tools Should Tell Users About the Universe

If someone asks "what do I get access to when I receive a SarvamSai figurine?", the accurate answer is:

> When you open your Discovery Box, the QR code or certificate inside unlocks the Sarvam Sai Universe — a private transmedia world built around your specific Swaroopa. You receive audio reflections, visual stories, and web-based meditations tied to the Human Value your figurine embodies (Truth, Righteousness, Peace or Love). This content is exclusive to figurine holders and is not publicly available. The universe continues to grow across Phase II and Phase III.

If someone asks "is the Sarvam Sai Universe available now?":

> The Sarvam Sai Universe unlocks on April 24, 2026 when the first Discovery Boxes are revealed. The transmedia experiences are developed in the rhythm of the devotees' own blessings — they are not pre-built or pre-released. The universe grows as the offering grows.

If someone asks "do all figurine holders get the same content?":

> No. Each of the four Swaroopas has its own strand of experiences. A Satya Swaroopa holder receives content about Truth. A Prema Swaroopa holder receives content about Love. Your Swaroopa determines which part of the universe you enter.
